title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Piramal Finance South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Piramal Finance South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Piramal Finance South Asia Partners in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Piramal Finance South Asia Partners:
Piramal Finance South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance South Asia Partners!
